## High-growth names lacking confirmation
### TITAN - Titan Company
- Opportunity score: 45 (Avoid for now)
- Revenue growth: 42.0% YoY, 68.2% QoQ
- Profit growth: 60.8% YoY, 54.4% QoQ
- Setup quality: 73%
- Catalyst strength: 0%
- Valuation stretch: 93%
- Positives: Strong earnings momentum, Price trend is constructive, Price near 52-week high
- Risks: Catalyst support is limited, Valuation looks stretched, Cash conversion is weak, Debt is high relative to profits
- Why it may work: TITAN combines 80% earnings momentum, 0% catalyst strength, and 73% setup quality.
- What invalidates it: Thesis weakens if momentum fades, the catalyst timeline slips, or valuation expands without matching earnings follow-through.
